children_list.title: Episode 1
children_list.summary: Love Island is back! 12 sexy singles party under the stars, but host Maya Jama soon shakes up the villa with a party game and an unexpected coupling twist.

children_list.title: Episode 2
children_list.summary: A massive twist leaves two islanders holding all the cards, and with just 24 hours to secretly decide who they'll dump from the Villa, first impressions mean everything.

children_list.title: Episode 3
children_list.summary: Shockwaves hit the Villa as the Bombshells reveal their decision for the twist double dumping, leaving the Islanders sweating. Which boy and girl will be sent packing?

children_list.title: Episode 4
children_list.summary: The Villa is left reeling after the double dumping blindsides everyone, but for the two dumped islanders, all is not as it seems. Things heat up on the terrace with a cheeky kiss.

children_list.title: Episode 5
children_list.summary: With a recoupling on the horizon, it is time to start grafting. The single islanders are busy checking out their options to see whose head might turn to avoid being dumped.

children_list.title: Unseen Bits #1
children_list.summary: Love Island: Unseen Bits is back and we've got a jam-packed episode bursting with fantastic moments and exclusive content from a thrilling first week in the villa.

children_list.title: Episode 7
children_list.summary: Fresh from the recoupling, some scandalous terrace flirting tension. The boys head out to meet two new bombshells, but little do they know the girls are watching their every move.

children_list.title: Episode 8
children_list.summary: Caught on camera: bombshell dates trigger a frosty villa reception! Yasmin and Ellie stage an intervention for Aidan, and two Islanders escape to the Hideaway garden.

children_list.title: Episode 9
children_list.summary: A secret hideaway kiss sends shockwaves through the villa. Meanwhile, Sam sets his sights on Victoria and Namibia, before a surprise text changes everything!

children_list.title: Episode 10
children_list.summary: The pressure in the Villa is dialled up as two bombshells turn a dramatic recoupling upside down. One Islander will be dumped, and one awkward apology leaves tensions simmering.

children_list.title: Episode 11
children_list.summary: A terrace kiss sparks an almighty Villa clash, while a slippery challenge drives a wedge between the islanders, landing some in hot water. Things are heating up in paradise!

children_list.title: Episode 12
children_list.summary: A relationship hits the rocks just as one boy tries to turn a new head. Meanwhile, a messy game of Truth or Dare turns sour and shakes up the islanders.

children_list.title: Unseen Bits #2
children_list.summary: Another edition of Unseen Bits that is bursting at the seams with exclusive unseen action from the Villa alongside fun, flirting, and fallouts.

children_list.title: Episode 14
children_list.summary: It's a new week in the Villa and heads are turning. One girl questions her future in the Villa, while a secret mission is masterminded to give two islanders some private time.

children_list.title: Episode 15
children_list.summary: Ready, steady, kiss! A secret snog is exposed just before the steamy Kissing Competition kicks off. With all lips locking, the challenge causes a massive stir among the islanders.

children_list.title: Episode 16
children_list.summary: In the Villa, the temperature is rising by the day as mistakes and moves are made. Love triangle tensions reach a boiling point, and a shock recoupling forces a massive shake-up.

children_list.title: Episode 17
children_list.summary: Four fresh Bombshells enter with a bang, whisking away four lucky Islanders for a sleepover. Left behind in the Villa, their lonely partners start questioning their connections.

children_list.title: Episode 18
children_list.summary: The Islanders return from the Sleepover to the Villa with the four new bombshells One boy confesses his cheeky antics, while a tense love triangle takes a scandalous turn.

children_list.title: Episode 19
children_list.summary: A boy in the Villa finds himself in deep water... again! While one couple secretly rekindle their relationship and risk it all, the latest Bombshells have huge decisions to make.

children_list.title: Unseen Bits #3
children_list.summary: It's time for this weeks jam-packed episode of exclusive unseen moments and all the hottest action from everyone's favourite villa, right here on Unseen Bits.

children_list.title: Episode 21
children_list.summary: A shock text crashes the Villa party, as the Islanders must now vote for the least compatible couple. With survival on the line, the vulnerable Islanders are ready to duke it out.

children_list.title: Episode 22
children_list.summary: Popstar Bebe Rexha rocks the Villa with a VIP performance, but the party mood is short-lived. A spicy game of 'Never Have I Ever' forces some very scandalous truths into the open.

children_list.title: Episode 23
children_list.summary: The iconic Heart Rate Challenge returns and the girls bring the heat to the Villa! As the monitors spike, the boys clash, and fragile connections are left on dangerously thin ice.

children_list.title: Episode 24
children_list.summary: It's time for the boys to send pulses racing in the Heart Rate Challenge! But the fun is short lived, as one couple hits breaking point just as a public vote threatens the Villa.

children_list.title: Episode 25
children_list.summary: After a tough decision, two Islanders are dumped from the Villa. A spicy game of "Tea, Receipts and Truths" exposes secrets, and a messy love triangle is pushed to the edge.

children_list.title: Episode 26
children_list.summary: "Tea, Receipts and Truths" continues to ruffle feathers. Right as the Islanders are rocked with the information from the game, and drama is high, it's time for a fresh recoupling.

children_list.title: Unseen Bits #4
children_list.summary: It's time for this weeks jam-packed episode of exclusive unseen moments and all the hottest action from everyone's favourite villa, right here on Unseen Bits featuring Bebe Rexha.

children_list.title: Episode 28
children_list.summary: It's time for Casa Amor, and Maya's surprise rocks the girls as six new boys arrive to turn up the heat. Meanwhile, over at Casa Amor, it's two truths, a lie, and lots of kissing.

children_list.title: Episode 29
children_list.summary: Casa Amor temptation takes over the boys as new connections spark! The girls worry about trusting their boys, before the Villa and Casa Amor go head-to-head in 'Don't Bottle It'.

children_list.title: Episode 30
children_list.summary: The boys continue to crack on with the new girls in Casa Amor, but a Secret Selfie Challenge threatens to expose their cheeky behaviour in plain sight.

children_list.title: Episode 31
children_list.summary: The fallout from the secret selfie challenge hits hard as the main villa girls speculate about their boys' activities. Plus, Maya is back as Casa Amor comes to an end.
